title: Summited Depths
description: Adds 3 new weapons and 2 new sets of armor for pvp
body:
- crimatic armor
>    crimatic armor is the same as netherite but with no knockback resistance and armor toughness
   -refer to gallery for recipe
- chematical armor
>    chematical armor is the same as netherite but with no knockback resistance and armor toughness
   -refer to gallery for recipe
- alchemical blade
>    this sword gives wither and glowing on hit and has no sweeping edge
   -refer to gallery for recipe
- longsword
>    this sword does 6 dmg and 2 atk speed
   this also requires a longsword hilt
   -refer to gallery for recipes
- crimson warhammer
>    this hammer give slowness on hit and does 12 dmg and 0.7 atk speed
   -refer to gallery for recipe
- crimson and refined chemicals
>    throw a netherite scrap onto their respetive blocks
   -refer to gallery for obtainment
